## What does this PR do?

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / code quality

## Testing

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] I have tested this in my own Home Assistant setup (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] The decision engine remains the single source of truth
- [ ] Sensors only read from the store; they do not introduce their own logic
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` if the change is user-facing
- [ ] I have updated `README.md` or `docs/` if documentation is affected
